CustomField.description: Legal counsel review status for litigation-threat-flagged comments. Pending Legal Review: flagged, not yet assigned. Assigned to Counsel: routed to a specific attorney. Legal Response Drafted: attorney has drafted a response for inclusion in the Final EIS comment response chapter. Response Finalized: response included in the published Final EIS. No Action Required: counsel determined this does not require a specific response.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Legal review status for litigation-threat-flagged comments. Required response workflow — flagged comments must reach Response Finalized before Final EIS publication.
CustomField.label: Legal Review Status
